theme: pick one dish per stall so ingredients overlap
title: Stall Menu DAG
strategies: per-stall greedy / bottom-up tree-cost DP (textbook e-graph extraction, ignores sharing)

coalition exchange search: cluster stalls by shared-ingredient signature and evaluate
     joint switches, since a single stall's switch is never locally attractive on its own

exact ILP / SAT-style joint optimization over the whole selected set (in principle;
     out of scope for a fast reference solution, but the true target of the objective)
